title: hieracium subpumilum
intro: Hieracium subpumilum, also known as Dwarf Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for wound healing and skin irritations. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that may help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hieracium subpumilum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its health benefits are thought to include relief from digestive issues, improved respiratory function, and enhanced overall well-being.
